scope.summary: C6 service_lifecycle split: fbee1a24 extracted the service unit rendering seam into service_lifecycle/service_units.rs and lowered the service_lifecycle.rs max-file-size ratchet without changing service install/update/status behavior.
out_of_scope: The CLI extraction in the same source commit, which is already closed under bead oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.4.6.5.
Other C6 splits and ratchet issues, including crates/oraclemcp-core/src/server.rs regrowth after fbee1a24.
Later edits to scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh after fbee1a24; the fbee1a24 ratchet lines were verified by blame but the file cannot be in close scope because it changed later.
Live service-manager mutation on systemd/launchd/Windows; this close uses focused CLI/e2e and compile evidence only.

entry_points.name: source split commit
entry_points.trace: `git show --find-renames --stat --summary fbee1a24 -- crates/oraclemcp/src/service_lifecycle.rs crates/oraclemcp/src/service_lifecycle/service_units.rs scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh` shows 105 insertions, 96 deletions, create mode 100644 service_lifecycle/service_units.rs, service_lifecycle.rs reduced by 98 lines, and scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh updated in the same commit.

entry_points.name: service unit seam isomorphism
entry_points.trace: `git show fbee1a24 -- crates/oraclemcp/src/service_lifecycle.rs crates/oraclemcp/src/service_lifecycle/service_units.rs` shows systemd_unit, launchd_plist, windows_bin_path, systemd_quote, windows_quote, and xml_escape moved behind `mod service_units;` with unchanged bodies except visibility becoming pub(super).

entry_points.name: focused CLI and setup/service coverage
entry_points.trace: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo test -p oraclemcp --test cli` passed 27/27 on 2026-07-22. This suite covers setup/default wrapper paths, generated client snippet launch, consent/refusal paths, dashboard pairing, and command help/exit-code behavior that would expose command-surface drift from the split.

entry_points.name: crate compile
entry_points.trace: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target cargo check -p oraclemcp` passed on 2026-07-22 after reconciling fbee1a24 against current main.

entry_points.name: service lifecycle ratchet
entry_points.trace: `wc -l crates/oraclemcp/src/service_lifecycle.rs crates/oraclemcp/src/service_lifecycle/service_units.rs` reports 5448 and 97 lines respectively; `git blame -L 40,44 scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh` attributes those ratchet entries to fbee1a24.

limitations: The source commit fbee1a24 also extracted cli.rs and was already used to close oraclemcp-eng-program-bp8ia.4.6.5; this close deliberately reuses the same source SHA only for the service_lifecycle/service_units.rs seam.

`scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh` is currently red on out-of-scope crates/oraclemcp-core/src/server.rs: 4241 lines versus ratchet 4145. The in-scope service_lifecycle.rs and service_lifecycle/service_units.rs ratchet entries remain within their fbee1a24 limits.
No live systemd/launchd/Windows service mutation was run for this close.

known_defects.description: Current committed arch-fitness ratchet violation outside this bead: crates/oraclemcp-core/src/server.rs has 4241 lines versus measured ratchet 4145.
